creator: takacsk2004@yahoo.com
text:
X doesn't start with 'intel' (Asus P5QPL-AM G41 express).
See Xorg log below 

No xorg.conf

$ pciconf -l | grep vga
vgapci0@pci0:0:2:0:	class=0x030000 card=0x836d1043 chip=0x2e328086 rev=0x03 hdr=0x00

$ kldload agp
kldload: can't load agp: File exists
